metadata.command:
echo "=== 测试新配置 ===" && \
echo "" && \
echo "1. 检查配置是否正确加载" && \
cat /root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json | jq '.activityDetection.thresholds' && \
echo "" && \
echo "2. 检查刚收到的告警 e80a096b" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "12:17:00" | grep -i "e80a096b\|activity timeout" | head -10 && \
echo "" && \
echo "3. 检查告警是否只发送一次（去重生效）" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "12:17:00" | grep -c "e80a096b" && \
echo "" && \
echo "4. 检查 activityMap 中是否已删除该记录" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "12:17:00" | grep -i "Removed activity\|deleteActivity\|e80a096b"

echo "=== 验证去重机制 ===" && \
echo "" && \
echo "1. 检查该 runId 是否在 activityTimeoutAlerted 集合中" && \
echo "(需要检查内存状态，通过日志推断)" && \
echo "" && \
echo "2. 等待 10 秒后检查是否有重复告警" && \
sleep 10 && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "12:17:30" | grep -i "e80a096b" | grep -i "activity timeout\|interrupt" | tail -5 && \
echo "" && \
echo "3. 如果没有新的告警，说明去重生效" && \
echo "告警次数: $(journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "12:17:00" | grep -c 'Activity timeout detected.*e80a096b')"
ls /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
ls -la /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/ 2>/dev/null || echo "目录为空或不存在"
ls -la /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/ 2>/dev/null || echo "目录为空或不存在"
ls -la /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/ 2>/dev/null || echo "目录为空或不存在"
python3 ~/.agent-reach/tools/wechat-article-for-ai/main.py "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/Ja_14EeSN1NaGqBeiONZAQ"
cat ~/.agent-reach/tools/wechat-article-for-ai/output/AI\ 编码总返工？OpenSpec\ 最佳实战：\ 3\ 步工作流\ ×\ 3\ 种场景，新老项目通用/AI\ 编码总返工？OpenSpec\ 最佳实战：\ 3\ 步工作流\ ×\ 3\ 种场景，新老项目通用.md
find ~/.agent-reach/tools/wechat-article-for-ai/output -name "*.md" -mmin -5 | head -5

ls -la ~/.agent-reach/tools/wechat-article-for-ai/output/ 2>/dev/null || echo "目录不存在" && \
pwd && \
ls -la output/ 2>/dev/null || echo "当前目录也没有output"

echo "=== 检查运行中任务 ===" && \
ls -la /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/ && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查子任务状态文件 ===" && \
cat /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/.subagent-status.json 2>/dev/null || echo "文件不存在"

echo "=== 安装 OpenSpec ===" && \
npm install -g @fission-ai/openspec@latest && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 验证安装 ===" && \
openspec --version && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 初始化 OpenSpec ===" && \
cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && \
openspec init --tools claude

echo "=== 检查生成的文件 ===" && \
find /root/.openclaw/workspace -name ".claude" -o -name "openspec" 2>/dev/null | head -10 && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== OpenSpec 目录结构 ===" && \
ls -la /root/.openclaw/workspace/openspec/ && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Claude Skills ===" && \
ls -la /root/.openclaw/workspace/.claude/skills/ 2>/dev/null && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Claude Commands ===" && \
ls -la /root/.openclaw/workspace/.claude/commands/ 2>/dev/null

echo "=== 检查 opsx commands ===" && \
ls -la /root/.openclaw/workspace/.claude/commands/opsx/ && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查 propose skill ===" && \
cat /root/.openclaw/workspace/.claude/skills/openspec-propose/SKILL.md

echo "=== 检查 running 目录 ===" && \
ls -la /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/ 2>/dev/null || echo "目录为空或不存在"

echo "=== 检查任务 2483307f 执行状态 ===" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "14:04:00" | grep -i "2483307f" | head -20 && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查是否有工具调用（说明任务在执行）===" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "14:04:00" --until "14:07:00" | grep -i "tool_call\|exec\|write\|read" | grep -i "2483307f" | head -10 && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查活跃状态追踪 ===" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "14:04:00" | grep -i "activity.*2483307f\|lastActivity\|trackSession"

echo "=== 检查 runId 2483307f 的完整生命周期 ===" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "14:00:00" | grep -i "2483307f" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查 14:01-14:06 期间的所有工具调用 ===" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "14:01:00" --until "14:07:00" | grep -i "tool_call\|Exec started\|Exec ended" | tail -20 && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 当前时间 ===" && \
date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'

echo "=== 调整策略 ===" && \
echo "方案：禁用主任务的活跃超时检测（主任务等待用户输入是正常的）" && \
echo "" && \
echo "修改配置..." && \
cat /root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json | jq '.activityDetection.thresholds.main = 0' > /tmp/config.json && \
mv /tmp/config.json /root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 验证配置 ===" && \
cat /root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json | jq '.activityDetection.thresholds' && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 提交更改 ===" && \
cd /root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor && \
git add -A && \
git commit -m "fix: disable main task activity timeout detection

Main tasks often wait for user input, which is normal behavior.
Only subtasks and ACP sessions need activity timeout detection." && \
git push origin main && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 重启 Gateway ===" && \
systemctl restart openclaw-gateway && \
sleep 3 && \
systemctl is-active openclaw-gateway

echo "=== 检查兜底检测配置 ===" && \
cat /root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json | jq '{monitoring: {mainTaskTimeout: .monitoring.mainTaskTimeout, stalledRunningThreshold: .monitoring.stalledRunningThreshold}, fallbackTimeout: .fallbackTimeout}' && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查停滞检测逻辑 ===" && \
grep -A 10 "stalledRunningThreshold\|Stalled task detected" /root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/index.ts | head -20

echo "=== 检查 Gateway 状态 ===" && \
systemctl is-active openclaw-gateway && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查配置是否生效 ===" && \
cat /root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json | jq '.activityDetection.thresholds' && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查最近的活跃检测日志 ===" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager --since "14:15:00" | grep -i "activity timeout\|threshold" | tail -5

cd /root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor && \
echo "=== 检查状态 ===" && \
git status && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== 提交并推送 ===" && \
git add -A && \
git commit -m "fix: disable main task activity timeout detection

Main tasks often wait for user input, which is normal behavior.
Only subtasks and ACP sessions need activity timeout detection.

Fallback mechanisms still work:
- Layer 4 timeout (2 hours)
- Stalled task detection (30 min)
- Completion detection" && \
git push origin main && \
echo "" && \
